title: Establish the reviewed M01 protocol epoch

limits.architecture_changes: allow only the canonical M01 protocol epoch and generated-client layout defined by WP-M01-002
limits.public_breaking_changes: allow exactly one reviewed break from the non-production M00 dennett.v1 scaffold; no production consumer exists

stop_conditions: owner approval is required before merge
a production or external generated-client consumer is discovered
protocol semantics conflict across canonical documents
detached adversarial review leaves a blocker or high finding open
required test fails after two bounded repair attempts
scope expands beyond handshake, bootstrap, project/session commands, cancellation, typed errors or revisioned session watch frames
